data.current_summary: Get random image(s) from a category
data.current_description: Returns one or more random images or GIFs from the specified category.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves one or more random anime images or GIFs from the specified category (e.g., neko, kitsune, waifu, husbando, or reaction types). Accepts optional parameters to control the number of results returned. Returns an ImageResponse object containing an array of image results, each with URL, source, and artist information.
